text:
Tom's day was not as sunny as you might expect. It started off with him forgetting where he parked his car, a common issue lately. After wandering through several unrecognizable parking garages and honking his horn at a few bewildered vehicles, he finally found his parking spot, under a hawthorn tree. It was the first sunny light of morning, and he quickly went inside to get a coffee.

As soon as he lifted the lid of the thermos, spilling hot coffee down his vest, his phone buzzed with an urgent email from his company. This was not ideal, but he read it quickly, "Due to recent industry downturns, we're limiting staff work hours. Please report to the new work-from-home policy office, due north, first tower. Meeting at 9 AM."

Defeated and with an early start creeping closer to dusk, Tom drove home, cursing traffic and his tardy timing all at once. He decided maybe he'd treat
